examples: This place has a great vibe.
I'm getting good vibes from this restaurant.
The vibe at the concert was electric.
context: I love the smell of the beach and you get a really nice breeze from the water. I love how active people are around here. I always see people jogging on the beach, paddle boarding, and even swimming in the very early morning. It's a great vibe and it actually really motivates me.
